kill_fact: No kill. The catalyst survives independent verification: DURAVYU's Phase 3 LUGANO wet-AMD topline is genuinely LIVE, dated, and UNFIRED (no topline release exists as of the verification date), the DSMC reviewed SAFETY ONLY so the efficacy non-inferiority outcome remains a true open binary, and the downside is backstopped by a REAL cash floor ($223M into Q4 2027, no going-concern, no forced ATM before the data). The spread has NOT closed. The only load-bearing flaw is the DATE: primary sources say 'mid-2026 / beginning in August 2026,' not the dossier's hard 2026-07-31.
corrections: DATE: Catalyst-Watch hard date 2026-07-31 is ~2-4 weeks EARLY. Primary company guidance (5/14/2026 DSMC release: 'topline data on track for mid-2026'; 5/6/2026 Q1 8-K: LUGANO 'beginning in August 2026,' LUCIA ~2 months later). Move the dated milestone to August 2026 (H2-2026 window). FLOOR is event-specific, NOT a deal-break price: it rests on cash + speculative residual-pipeline credit, so on a clean efficacy WIPE the realistic floor is closer to ~$3 (bare net cash, ~$2.6/sh) than $5.50 — the $5.50 floor assumes the market still credits LUCIA optionality + DR/DME pipeline post-miss, which a true LUGANO failure would partly discredit. STRUCTURE: this is a two-leg binary (LUGANO then LUCIA ~2mo later); a LUGANO-win/LUCIA-miss split is a live, un-hedged scenario the headline asymmetry understates.
evidence: EyePoint press release, 2026-05-14 (GlobeNewswire/IR): 'Third Consecutive Positive DSMC Recommendation for Phase 3 Wet AMD Trials for DURAVYU, Building Confidence Ahead of Mid-2026 Topline Data' — DSMC reviewed masked SAFETY data only (efficacy unreviewed); LUGANO topline on track for mid-2026, LUCIA to follow.

EyePoint Q1 2026 results, 8-K filed 2026-05-06 (SEC EDGAR CIK 0001314102, accession 000119312526207537): $223M cash, equivalents & marketable securities as of 3/31/2026 (down from $306M at 12/31/2025), runway into Q4 2027 'beyond key DURAVYU Phase 3 wet AMD milestones'; LUGANO topline 'beginning in August 2026,' LUCIA ~2 months later.

EyePoint Form 10-Q for period ended 2026-03-31 (SEC EDGAR, accession 000119312526211870): confirms $223M cash/investments, no going-concern qualification, operations funded into Q4 2027 — verifies the cash floor and the absence of a forced-dilution gun before the readout.

EyePoint 8-K, 2026-05-02 enrollment/safety update: all active treatment-arm patients past 2nd DURAVYU dose, >35% at 3rd dose; ~432-pt LUGANO non-inferiority design vs on-label 2mg aflibercept — confirms fully-enrolled, fixed-endpoint pivotal (catalyst WILL occur on the window; only outcome unknown).
